channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gachagua Raises Alarm Over Possible Ruto Operative Within United Opposition
item.description: DCP party leader Rigathi Gachagua has raised serious concerns about what he claims is a mole within the United Opposition, allegedly working to destabilise the coalition ahead of the 2027 general elec...

item.title: Snap and Perplexity End $400M Partnership Without Conflict
item.description: Snap Inc. announced in its quarterly earnings report that its planned $400 million partnership with Perplexity has been terminated amicably. Originally announced in November, the deal would have integ...

item.title: Airbus to Deliver 150 A220 Jets to AirAsia, Strengthening Quebec’s Aviation Industry
item.description: Airbus Canada has signed a major agreement to supply AirAsia with 150 of its A220 jets, marking the largest single order in the history of the Canadian-made aircraft. The jets are manufactured in Mira...

item.title: LHC Clarifies Jurisdiction of Special Property Courts for Overseas Pakistanis
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has clarified that special courts established for overseas Pakistanis can handle a wide range of property-related cases, not just disputes over ownership or possession. Jus...

item.title: Federal High Court orders interim forfeiture of nine properties linked to former minister Timipre Sylva
item.description: The Federal High Court for Abuja don order say nine properties wey dey linked to former Minister of State for Petroleum Resources, Timipre Sylva, make dem temporarily pass to the Federal Government. J...

item.title: Gwyneth Paltrow discusses wealth inequality on Goop Podcast and sparks mixed reactions
item.description: Gwyneth Paltrow, the 53-year-old actress and founder of the luxury wellness brand Goop, has caused controversy following a discussion about wealth inequality on her Goop Podcast with journalist Kara S...

item.title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio to visit India for key bilateral talks and Quad meeting in May
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is expected to visit India from May 24 to 26 for a three-day trip aimed at strengthening India–U.S. relations and advancing strategic cooperation. This will be his ...

item.title: BHP appeal rejected over Brazil dam disaster as NSW man faces hate speech charge
item.description: This live news update covers several major developments across Australia and abroad. A key story is that mining giant BHP has been denied permission by the UK Court of Appeal to challenge a ruling tha...

item.title: Navotas landfill fire continues to affect air quality, health, and livelihoods
item.description: The Navotas landfill fire, which started on April 10, has been burning for weeks and continues to pose serious risks to nearby communities. Around 31.95 hectares of waste have already been affected, w...

item.title: Carpenter's wife receives stage four breast cancer diagnosis following early symptoms
item.description: Dave Gawler, a carpenter known for helping construct the Love Island: All Stars villa, has shared the distressing news that his wife, Bell, 50, has been diagnosed with stage four HER2 breast cancer. T...

item.title: SGA pledges first two draft picks to strengthen Alas Pilipinas national volleyball team
item.description: In a show of strong support for the Philippine national volleyball program, SGA has officially committed its first two picks in the upcoming draft to the Alas Pilipinas team. This move is seen as a st...

item.title: Israeli Court Upholds Detention of Two Gaza-Bound Flotilla Activists
item.description: An Israeli court on Wednesday refused an appeal against the detention of two foreign activists, Saif Abu Keshek, a Spanish national of Palestinian origin, and Brazilian Thiago Avila, who were captured...

item.title: Meghan Markle shares a previously unseen photo of baby Archie resting on Prince Harry
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex, Meghan Markle, recently shared a previously unseen photograph of her son, Archie, during his infancy. The image, showing the baby peacefully asleep on Prince Harry's chest, offe...

item.title: Profile of Celestine 'Wakavinye' Ndinda following separation from Njugush
item.description: Celestine 'Wakavinye' Ndinda is a well-known Kenyan digital content creator and entrepreneur, recognised for her authentic personality and inspiring life story. Born on December 3, 1992, in Mathare, N...

item.title: Francois Janse van Rensburg embarks on 1 500km trek to support Somerset West Family Shelter
item.description: Francois Janse van Rensburg, a 63-year-old resident of Somerset West, has set out on an ambitious 1 500km walk from Windhoek, Namibia, to Somerset West. His campaign, titled 'Walk the Talk', began on ...

item.title: Methodist Church Nigeria Calls for Security, Affordable Living, and Fair Elections
item.description: The Methodist Church Nigeria, Diocese of Wesley, don raise alarm over di wahala wey Nigerians dey face now, especially high cost of living and insecurity. During their first synod for Cathedral of Gra...

item.title: Federal Judge Unseals Jeffrey Epstein's Alleged Suicide Note
item.description: A federal judge in White Plains, New York, has unsealed a note purportedly written by Jeffrey Epstein, the notorious financier who faced charges of sexually trafficking minors and later died in jail. ...

item.title: Delhi Declaration to Strengthen Global Big Cat Conservation at IBCA Summit 2026
item.description: Union Environment Minister Bhupender Yadav announced that the upcoming Global Big Cat Summit, organised by the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) on June 1–2, 2026, will adopt the Delhi Declaration...

item.title: Dina Bonnevie Praises Fyang Smith's Talent Despite Her Playful Nature
item.description: Veteran actress Dina Bonnevie recently shared her thoughts on young actress Fyang Smith, highlighting both her energetic personality and her acting skills. In an interview, Bonnevie described Fyang as...

item.title: Frozen Meals Adapt to Weight Loss Drug Trends in the US
item.description: Frozen TV dinners, a staple of American convenience food for over 70 years, are being reimagined in response to the growing use of GLP-1 medications for weight loss. Nearly one in five American adults...
